 <div class="theme-default-content content__default"><h1 id="删除子频道"><a href="#删除子频道" class="header-anchor">#</a> 删除子频道</h1> <h2 id="接口"><a href="#接口" class="header-anchor">#</a> 接口</h2> <div class="language-http line-numbers-mode"><pre class="language-http codecopy-enabled"><code>DELETE /channels/{channel_id}
</code><i class="code-copy" title="Copy to clipboard"><svg style="color:#aaa;font-size:14px" t="1572422231464" class="icon" viewBox="0 0 1024 1024" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" 11.815385-7.876923 19.692308-19.692307 19.692308H216.615385c-11.815385 0-19.692308-7.876923-19.692308-19.692308v-39.384615c0-11.815385 7.876923-19.692308 19.692308-19.692308h315.076923c11.815385 0 0-19.692308-7.876923-19.692308-19.692308v-39.384615c0-11.815385 7.876923-19.692308 19.692308-19.692308h393.846153c11.815385 0 19.692308 7.876923 19.692308 19.692308v39.384615z" p-id="3202"></path></svg></i></pre> <div class="line-numbers-wrapper"><span class="line-number">1</span><br></div></div><h2 id="功能描述"><a href="#功能描述" class="header-anchor">#</a> 功能描述</h2> <p>用于删除 <code>channel_id</code> 指定的子频道。</p> <ul><li>要求操作人具有<code>管理子频道</code>的权限，如果是机器人，则需要将机器人设置为管理员。</li> <li>修改成功后，会触发<strong>子频道删除事件</strong>。</li></ul> <div class="custom-block danger"><p class="custom-block-title">注意</p> <ul><li>公域机器人暂不支持申请，仅私域机器人可用，选择私域机器人后默认开通。</li> <li>注意: 开通后需要先将机器人从频道移除，然后重新添加，方可生效。</li></ul></div> <h2 id="content-type"><a href="#content-type" class="header-anchor">#</a> Content-Type</h2> <div class="language-http line-numbers-mode"><pre class="language-http codecopy-enabled"><code>application/json
</code><i class="code-copy" title="Copy to clipboard"><svg style="color:#aaa;font-size:14px" t="1572422231464" class="icon" viewBox="0 0 1024 1024" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" <code>200</code>。</p> <h2 id="错误码"><a href="#错误码" class="header-anchor">#</a> 错误码</h2> <p>详见<a href="/wiki/develop/api-v2/openapi/error/error.html" class="">错误码</a>。</p> <h2 id="示例"><a href="#示例" class="header-anchor">#</a> 示例</h2> <p>请求数据包</p> <div class="language-shell line-numbers-mode"><pre class="language-shell codecopy-enabled"><code>DELETE /channels/123456
</code><i class="code-copy" title="Copy to clipboard"><svg style="color:#aaa;font-size:14px" t="1572422231464" class="icon" viewBox="0 0 1024 1024" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
